visit_summary: Excellent find! The workbench is in pristine, like-new condition with almost all accessories clearly visible.
alignment_summary: The real home photo shows a pristine, barely-used wooden workbench that perfectly aligns with the 'like new' and 'basically brand new' description.

reasons.text: The workbench wood and paint show no signs of wear, chips, or scuffs in the photo.
Seller states the item is 'basically brand new' and 'kids never quite took to it,' explaining the excellent condition.
Almost all key accessories (vise, gears, clock, tools) are present and set up in the real photo.
Seller is unsure if absolutely 100% of the tiny screws/bolts are there ('Think we have all pieces').

seller_questions: Hi! Is the workbench still available?
Are there any extra loose screws, bolts, or small wooden pieces stored separately that aren't pictured on the bench?
Does it come pre-assembled as shown, or will it be disassembled for pickup?
seller_message_draft: Hi! I'm very interested in the Robud workbench. It looks in beautiful condition. Are there any extra loose screws or bolts included that aren't pictured on the bench? I can pick up this week!
limitations: We cannot verify if every single small wooden screw or bolt from the original retail set is present.
The structural stability of the wooden joints cannot be fully tested from a static photo.
We cannot verify the seller's responsiveness or exact pickup location.
research_recommended: Check the retail dimensions to ensure it fits in your vehicle assembled.
Verify if there are any active safety recalls for Robud wooden toys.
future_capability_note: We don't verify prices, recalls, or seller history yet — you'll need to check these yourself. A future version of this product will do that research for you.
